name: IGDB
author: My Media Vault
description: Game artwork & metadata provider (IGDB). Aggregated with other providers on hover. Requires free Twitch developer credentials configured in Settings.

settings.label: Twitch Client ID
settings.description: Create a free app at https://dev.twitch.tv/console/apps to get a Client ID.

settings.label: Twitch Client Secret
settings.description: The Client Secret from your Twitch developer app.
